name: typescript-algorithms-data-structures
description: TypeScript implementations of classic algorithms and data structures with tests, CI/CD, Docker support, and an automatically deployed GitHub Pages playground.

scripts.format:check: prettier --check package.json package-lock.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.demo.json jest.config.js .eslintrc.json .prettierrc .github/workflows/*.yml scripts/**/*.mjs src/**/*.ts demo/**/*.html demo/**/*.css demo/**/*.ts demo/**/*.svg
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build:demo
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && npm run typecheck:demo && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm test && npm run build:demo

author: Nikita Krivoshei
